name: Maria
manager_notes: Maria was passed over last cycle and has not raised it directly, but her engagement in team rituals has dropped. I suspect she may still be carrying unanswered questions about the decision. I need to clarify whether she got a concrete readout on the gap and whether she wants that now. I also want to understand if her mentoring program is strategic growth work or a place she is parking energy after feeling blocked in the main path.
answers: I am still thinking about last cycle.
The feedback was not specific enough.
I do not know what would move the next decision.
I am less motivated in team rituals lately.
I want impact at org level, not just strong project work.
I need a moment to think about that.
I want to start with one mentoring commitment that has clear scope and a review point next month.
